zh.Milan, Milano, Lombardia, Italy: 義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stefano Visconti of Milan於1288年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，他的父親Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano38歲，母親Bonacossa Borri34歲。他於1317年5月9日與Lady Valentina Doria of Milan在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年7月4日在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stefano Visconti of Milan于1288年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾时，他的父亲Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano38岁，母亲Bonacossa Borri34岁。他于1317年5月9日与Lady Valentina Doria of Milan在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年7月4日在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

nameMeanings.name: Stefano
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Stefano Visconti of Milan was born in 1288, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano, was 38 and his mother, Bonacossa Borri, was 34. He married Lady Valentina Doria of Milan on 9 May 1317, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 July 1327, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy.

fr.Milano, Lombardy, Italy: Santissima Redentore, Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stefano Visconti of Milan est né en 1288, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Bonacossa Borri, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Valentina Doria of Milan le 9 mai 1317, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1327, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie.

de.Milano, Lombardy, Italy: Santissima Redentore, Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Stefano Visconti of Milan 1288 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano 38 und seine Mutter Bonacossa Borri 34. Er hat am 9. Mai 1317 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien Lady Valentina Doria of Milan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1327 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stefano Visconti of Milan è nato il nel 1288 nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Bonacossa Borri, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Valentina Doria of Milan il 9 maggio 1317, nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 luglio 1327, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.

ko.Milano, Lombardy, Italy: 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오 산티시마 레덴토어
ko.lifeSummary: Stefano Visconti of Milan(이)가 1288년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Bonacossa Borri(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1317년 5월 9일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 Lady Valentina Doria of Milan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 7월 4일 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stefano Visconti of Milan nasceu em 1288, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Bonacossa Borri, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Valentina Doria of Milan em 9 de maio de 1317, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1327, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália.

ru.Milano, Lombardy, Italy: сантиссима редентор, милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stefano Visconti of Milan родился в 1288 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Matteo I Visconti, Le Grand, Seigneur di Milano было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Bonacossa Borri, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Valentina Doria of Milan 9 мая 1317 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 июля 1327 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия.

Se casó con Lady Valentina Doria of Milan el 9 de mayo de 1317, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de julio de 1327, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia.
